title: Harborline Stilt House
description: Two-story oak and stone stilt house over the eastern bay. Built-in dock, brewing loft, and a redstone-lit lantern walkway. Sold as-is with furnishings.

title: Ashgrove Farm Plot
description: Flat 40x40 plot bordering the Ashgrove biome, cleared and claimed. Villager trading hall already wired with iron farm output.

title: The Hollow Exchange (Shop)
description: Two-floor shop front on Capital Row with 24 rental stall slots, item frame signage, and a shulker box vault. Currently 70% leased.

title: Deepwarren Redstone Base
description: Hidden mountain base with a full auto-smelter, mob farm, and piston vault door. Includes rail line back to Capital Row.

title: Quiet Pines Cabin
description: Small spruce cabin tucked into the northern pines. One bedroom, wraparound porch, private nether portal.

title: Emberfields Nether Outpost
description: Fortified nether outpost near a blaze spawner with obsidian perimeter and a linked overworld portal at Capital Row.
